title: Keys of Recording
description: Level-up your Minecraft content creation experience with optimization, decoration and utility mods.
body:
![Project Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02844457b582b5f5ed541fff18e6c76ca7663391_0.webp)

# Backstory
As a chill person on YouTube, I occasionally enjoy watching professional videos of other people that make a simple Minecraft topic into hype as big as Team Cherry dropping a new project. And I often find myself asking what the key is to achieving such cinematic shots, and overall making the video feel very "premium".

For my initial research, I just went around YouTube and tried to find some mods that either other people use very often, or mods that aren't as impactful, but can draw the viewers attention with little details. And over time, I've gone through some mods on Modrinth too, and attempted to make my first video ever afterwards. And all of those experiences combined to make one mod pack to fulfill many tools for content creation, be it single player videos or videos with multiple people interacting.

However, I also didn't have the best laptop, so I basically used an optimization pack and added mods in it before making this pack. Therefore, this pack doubled as a content creation and optimization pack.

# Features
Enough of the yappery, let's talk about what it can perform for the user.

- To begin with, this pack of course has the essential tools to record videos and get footage from in-game.
- The pack is also equipped with several small tweak mods that are picked to be close to the vanilla experience.
- Additionally, it has optimization mods to get a better FPS count, specifically for older hardware.
- Complimentary Shaders are used for the pack, although you can use whatever you would like.
- There are also some quality-of-life additions that makes the game feel more _smooth_.

# Mod List
Huge shoutout to these mods/resource packs/shaders and their creators and thanks for their approval of usage.

<details>

You can also find pictures from some mods in the Gallery!
